creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://euroquis.nl/kde/2024/10/08/freebsd14.html> reminds us of the kde-it_goes_to_6 branch. 

This report 283296 is one of two that I treat as blocking, for example: 

- <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/pull/423>

> handbook: Guide users towards installing Plasma 6 / KDE 6 packages 
> by claucambra · Pull Request #423 · freebsd/freebsd-doc
